tree.name: Aaron Gordon
tree.tradeDescription: Denver traded Gary Harris, RJ Hampton, and a 2025 1st round pick (top-5 protected) to Orlando for Aaron Gordon and Gary Clark

assetsGivenUp.name: Gary Harris
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Denver traded the #11 pick (Doug McDermott) and Anthony Randolph to Chicago for Jusuf Nurkic (#16), Gary Harris (#19), and a 2015 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2014 1st Round Pick (#11)
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own pick, sent to Chicago in draft-night trade for Harris and Nurkic

assetsGivenUp.name: Anthony Randolph
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed by Denver as free agent (July 2012), sent to Chicago in draft-night trade

assetsGivenUp.name: RJ Hampton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team Jrue Holiday trade: Denver sent 2023 1st round pick (top-14 protected) to OKC and received RJ Hampton from Milwaukee

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#27) via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2023 first-round pick, top-14 protected, sent to OKC in 4-team Jrue Holiday deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#25) via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2025 1st round pick, top-5 protected, conveyed to Orlando who selected Jase Richardson #25
